document_text:
Project: YieldFlow
Chain: Arbitrum
Category: Lending

Overview
YieldFlow is an open-source lending market. It is controlled by a multisig, not a single admin key.

Tokenomics
Token: YF
Supply: 50,000,000
Team allocation: 15%
Liquidity is locked. No mint function.

Security
The protocol has a Pending audit from CertiK. During preliminary reviews, a High severity vulnerability regarding flash loan price manipulation was identified, and it has NOT yet been mitigated.
